title: Supply Chain Manager - Safexpress - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Safexpress - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Safexpress. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
